reply_text: Season one adapted 2.5 arcs of 10 of the Sandman comics, but creators of the show wanted to focus mainly on Dream of the Endless as the main character and he does appear in many comic issues only as a cameo for one-off stories. So they cut on the board non essantial stuff and they will adapt the rest of the story in this season. I assume the main reason is the budget, season 1 was one of the most expensive projects that Netflix produced. Many people say that reason why there will be only 2 seasons is because of the allegations of Neil Gaiman, but those first appeared in July 2024 and filming of season 2 finished in August 2024, so the story structure was finished atleast year before Gaiman's allegations. Maybe if the season 1 was more succesful, the show could have gone for more seasons with stratching of the source material, but of that would happen, then Sandman would have been likely canceled for the allegations of it's creator. Season 2 will finish the overall story based on the source material.
